scripts.build: bun build src/main.ts --outdir=dist --target=browser --minify && cp public/index.html dist/ && cp -r assets dist/ && touch dist/.nojekyll
scripts.dev: bun build src/main.ts --outdir=dist --target=browser --watch & while true; do cp public/index.html dist/ 2>/dev/null; sleep 0.5; done & bun x serve dist -p 8080 & wait
scripts.check: bun run lint && bun run build && bun run validate
